ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment during which the measurement was taken */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Kelvin */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage in Volts */,
  "resistance" REAL /* Resistance in Ohms */,
  "current_source" REAL /* Current source in Amps */,
  "electric_field" REAL /* Electric field in Volts per centimeter */,
  "resistivity" REAL /* Resistivity in Ohm-centimeters */,
  "current_density" REAL /* Current density in Amps per square centimeter */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* The exact time when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* The location where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations during the measurement */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement for each property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* The current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* The location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "researcher_position" TEXT /* The position or role of the researcher */,
  "researcher_phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the researcher */,
  "researcher_affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_category" TEXT /* The category of the unit (e.g., electrical, physical) */,
  "unit_conversions" TEXT /* JSON or text field containing conversion factors to other units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* The composition of the material */,
  "material_properties" TEXT /* JSON or text field containing additional properties of the material */,
  "material_source" TEXT /* The source or supplier of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_materials" (
  "experiment_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between experiment and material */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "quantity_used" REAL /* The quantity of the material used in the experiment */,
  "material_preparation" TEXT /* Notes on how the material was prepared for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_materials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* The model of the equipment */,
  "equipment_serial_number" TEXT /* The serial number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_calibration_date" TEXT /* The last calibration date of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_equipment" (
  "experiment_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between experiment and equipment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "equipment_usage_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the equipment was used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES measurement_equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_equipment_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "standard_year" TEXT /* The year the standard was published */,
  "standard_url" TEXT /* URL to the standard's documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_standards" (
  "experiment_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between experiment and standard */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standard */,
  "standard_version" TEXT /* The version of the standard used in the experiment */,
  "standard_implementation_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the standard was implemented in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_standards_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_standards_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES measurement_standards ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data or notes related to the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* The type of result (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "result_source" TEXT /* The source of the result (e.g., manual input, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_results_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis result */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* The method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* JSON or text field containing parameters used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_analyses_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* The format of the report (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* The intended audience for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_reports_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was added */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* The size of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* A checksum to verify the integrity of the file */,
  "file_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
